description: Create a progressive three-scenario training curriculum in Bridge Command's Solent environment. Establish three distinct scenario directories under /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/: 'p) Cadet Module L1 Familiarisation' (Daytime 10:00, 10nm visibility, calm weather 0, 2 traffic vessels), 'q) Cadet Module L2 Night Traffic' (Nighttime 22:00, 8nm visibility, moderate weather 3, 4 traffic vessels), and 'r) Cadet Module L3 Restricted Vis' (Dawn 06:00, 1.5nm visibility, rough weather 5 with rain, 6 traffic vessels). All scenarios must use the 'Solent' environment setting, place the own ship at valid coordinates (Lat 50.7-50.8, Long -1.3 to -1.0), and include at least two waypoint legs for every traffic vessel. Additionally, configure bc5.ini with radar_range_resolution=256, max_radar_range=72, full_radar=1, and arpa_on=1. Document a training syllabus of at least 500 words at /home/ga/Documents/cadet_module_syllabus.txt detailing learning objectives for each level and referencing COLREGS Rules 5, 6, 7, and 19. Login: ga / password123.
